title: The Missing Painting
content: During an art exhibition, visitors noticed that one small painting had disappeared from the gallery wall. The staff quickly searched every room while politely asking guests to remain inside for a few minutes. Everyone wondered what had happened. After checking the security cameras, they discovered that an employee had removed the painting earlier to replace its damaged frame. He had forgotten to inform the rest of the team. The painting was safely returned to its place, and everyone laughed with relief. The mystery had a simple explanation after all.
